company_name: Samsung Biologics GSK US facility acquisition
notes: US capacity is strategic, but utilization, customer contracts, technology transfer, OPM, and FCF must be verified.
CDMO references are Green-eligible only after contract, utilization, margin, and FCF conversion are matched to stage dates.

company_name: Intuitive Surgical Q1 2026 procedure growth and recurring consumables
notes: Installed base, procedure growth, and instruments/accessories revenue make surgical robots a separate recurring-revenue archetype.

company_name: Straumann dental implant growth with VBP risk
notes: Dental implant growth is aligned when procedure and sales growth persist, but VBP price control is a hard gate.

company_name: Lilly oral GLP-1 Foundayo FDA approval
notes: Approval and TAM support Stage 1/2; scripts, coverage, supply, price, and OP/EPS decide higher stages.
Maintenance evidence can support a more durable GLP-1 path, but insurance, price, and scripts still gate Green.

company_name: Boehringer / GoodRx Humira biosimilar access but uptake watch
notes: A 92% discount improves access, but slow prescription switching and margin defense remain core gates.

company_name: Cigna / Accredo Humira biosimilar $0 copay formulary switch
notes: PBM/formulary and $0 copay are stronger than approval, but prescription conversion and margin defense still gate Stage 3.

company_name: Novo Nordisk GLP-1 price pressure and competition
notes: GLP-1 TAM can still break when price, competition, coverage, and scripts hit estimates.

company_name: Hims branded GLP-1 pivot and unexpected loss
notes: Telehealth GLP-1 channel stories require legal channel, CAC, margin, revenue recognition, and FCF checks.
Large obesity demand does not offset an unproven or illegal drug-channel risk.

company_name: bluebird bio gene therapy cash crunch
notes: Approved gene therapies still fail E2R if uptake, reimbursement, and cash runway do not support FCF.
CRO is service revenue, but funding-cycle cuts can break backlog and forecast visibility.

company_name: Teladoc BetterHelp impairment and DTC unit economics failure
notes: Telehealth demand is not enough when CAC, impairment, churn, privacy, and FCF are weak.

company_name: Recursion Exscientia AI drug discovery platform merger
notes: AI drug-discovery consolidation is Watch until milestones, clinical proof, and commercial economics appear.

company_name: Lunit DBT external validation and subgroup risk
notes: AUC and external validation support Stage 1/2, but reimbursement, hospital workflow, and recurring revenue are separate gates.

company_name: Amgen / Samsung Bioepis biosimilar patent litigation risk
notes: Biosimilar approval or filing is not enough when patent litigation can delay launch and damage economics.
Aesthetic demand cannot offset counterfeit, unapproved-product, and safety-channel risks.
